name: Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Stir in an airtight container.
Shake before using.

name: Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Sift ingredients together 5 times.
Store in an air tight jar.
Keeps for 6 months.

name: Pumpkin Spice
directions: Mix ingredients in a bowl and store in an airtight container.
After you make this recipe and taste it  you can adjust the spices to suit your taste.

name: Substitution for Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Stir or shake ingredients together.
Store in a closed small container.
Use in place of"pumpkin pie spice" in your recipe.

name: Exceptional Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Thoroughly mix all ingredients together.

name: Apple Pie Spice
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Should you want to make a larger amount, store in an airtight container.

name: Simple Apple Pie Spice
directions: Combine all ingredients in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
Shake well to mix.
Uses: Add 1 teaspoon per pie. Stir into applesauce.
Heat with apple cider. Stir into crumb topping for coffeecake, Dutch apple pie, apple crisp.

name: Apple Pie Spice
directions: Mix all together and store in a container (an old spice container works well) in a cool, dry place.

name: Heavenly Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Simply stir these spices together well and store in a small airtight jar or old spice container that will hold about 6 oz.
Sprinkle some onto your coffee grounds before you start the coffeemaker every morning  --  it lends a wonderful aroma.
You can also mix this with some white sugar, as you would cinnamon-sugar, to sprinkle on your buttered toast etc.
Use it in any sweet baking  --  its heavenly!

name: Pumpkin Spice
directions: Stir together.

name: Pumpkin Pie Spice Mix
directions: Mix the ingredients up and use in your recipe.

name: The Grand Central Bakery Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and stir with a fork until well combined.
Store in a cool, dry place for up to 3 months.

name: Gingerbread Spice Blend
directions: Stir spices together and store in airtight container until ready to use.

name: Autumn Spice Blend
directions: Combine all ingredients in an airtight container.

name: Homemade Apple Pie Spice
directions: Place all ingredients in small, sealable container and mix together.  Use as directed in recipes that call for apple pie spice.
Store in a dry place, up to 6 months.

name: Homemade Pumpkin Pie Spice
directions: Place all ingredients in small, sealable container and mix together.  Use as directed in recipes that call for pumpkin pie spice.
Store in a dry place up to 6 months.

similar.name: The Grand Central Bakery Pumpkin Pie Spice

name: Pumpkin Pie Spice 4211
directions: put all into a festive mason jar and shake it up until it's all mixed up.
keep in the airtight mason jar.as per picture.

name: PUMPKIN PIE SPICE • HOMEMADE BLEND
directions: In a small bowl, combine all the ingredients together; stir well.
Store it in an airtight container.
